name: Chocolate Orange Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the first six ingredients. Add eggs, milk, Crisco, and vanilla extract. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until smooth.
3. Stir in boiling water. Mix well. Divide batter evenly between two 8-inch or 9-inch round cake pans.
4. Bake for 35 - 40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool on wire racks for 10 minutes, then remove from pans and cool completely.
Frosting:
5. Beat all frosting ingredients together until smooth and creamy, adding enough cream to achieve a smooth spreading consistency. Spread frosting between layers and over the top and sides of the cake. Decorate with orange zest.
Hint: A small amount of orange liqueur in the icing and drizzling it over the cake layers before frosting creates an elegant special occasion dessert. Freezing is excellent for storage.
